sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.74 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: Find all local formations${ F}$of finite groups such that every finite minimal non-${ F}$-group is either a Shmidt group (that is, a non-nilpotent finite group all of whose proper subgroups are nilpotent) or a group of prime order. { L.\,A.\,Shemetkov} They are found (S.\,F.\,Kamornikov, Siberian Math.~J., { 35}, no.\,4 (1994), 713--721).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
